name: deepwiki
title: DeepWiki
description: Search, open, and crawl DeepWiki pages for GitHub repositories.
author: vivek

commands.name: open-deepwiki
commands.title: Open DeepWiki Page
commands.description: Open DeepWiki for a GitHub repo URL, org/repo, or the current browser tab.

arguments.name: repoIdentifier
arguments.placeholder: Optional: GitHub URL or org/repo; falls back to current tab

commands.name: crawl-deepwiki-docs
commands.title: Crawl DeepWiki Docs
commands.description: Crawl DeepWiki docs for a repo URL, org/repo, or the current browser tab.

arguments.name: repoIdentifier
arguments.placeholder: Optional: GitHub URL or org/repo; falls back to current tab
